briefing: Markets drifted lower today with NASDAQ -0.7% and S&P 500 -0.2% — a neutral, low-conviction session. None of the top-scoring candidates showed the full four-signal confirmation (MACD crossover, bullish RSI, price above SMA-20, and volume surge) used for high-conviction entries, so we held cash and existing positions rather than forcing a buy.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A risk-off day is when investors pull back from riskier assets like growth stocks amid uncertainty, even without a specific negative headline. The prudent response is patience — holding cash and existing positions rather than chasing weak setups, and waiting for clearer bullish confirmation before committing new capital.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險規避」（Risk-Off）指投資者在不明朗環境下減少持有成長股等高風險資產，即使沒有明確的負面消息。此時較穩健的做法是保持耐性，持有現金及現有倉位，避免追逐訊號不明確的股票，待更清晰的看漲確認出現後才加碼。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices slipped modestly today, with the NASDAQ underperforming the S&P 500, reflecting a mild pullback in growth and tech-heavy names rather than any single catalyst. Trading volumes and momentum signals across the screened universe were unremarkable, consistent with a consolidation day after recent gains. No major scheduled data releases or earnings surprises appear to have driven the move.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤小幅回落，納指跌幅0.7%，跑輸標普500的0.2%跌幅，反映科技及成長股略為降溫，而非受單一事件觸發。篩選股票池中的量能與動能訊號普遍平淡，符合近期漲勢後的整理格局，市場亦未見重大數據或業績意外。
